title: woodsia hyperborea
intro: Woodsia hyperborea, also known as the Alaskan woodsia fern or the Bering Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Woodsia. It is native to the mountainous regions of North America and is recognized for its potential medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. Woodsia hyperborea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
